description: Centralized budget policy for SSA agents: daily and per-intent token/time caps for Session-related skills and supporting automations.

notes: All token values are approximate model tokens (prompt + completion).
All time values are wall-clock time caps for a single agent run, in milliseconds.
Soft caps should trigger early-termination or degraded detail; hard caps must cause a hard stop.
Intents not listed here should fall back to the `defaults` section.

session.compose.generic.description: Domain-agnostic session composition from imported plans, recipes, or manual inputs.

session.compose.cooking.description: Cooking-specific session composition with doneness cues, timers, and inventory links.

session.compose.cleaning.description: Cleaning session composition (room-by-room, product usage, safety checks).

session.compose.garden.description: Garden session composition (beds, tasks, weather-aware steps).

session.compose.animals.description: Animal care session composition (feeding, watering, health checks).

session.compose.preservation.description: Preservation session composition (canning, dehydrating, curing, etc.).

session.compose.storehouse.description: Storehouse session composition (inventory audits, bulk moves, cycle counts).

session.nowResolver.description: Resolve 'Now' CTA into the next runnable session (multi-domain filter + guard pre-check).

session.guardCheck.description: Evaluate guards (Sabbath, Quiet Hours, Weather, Inventory, Battery) per-step or pre-session.

session.swapSuggestions.description: Suggest alternate steps/sessions when guards block current step (inventory/weather/quiet hours/Sabbath).

session.analytics.summarize.description: Summarize completed/aborted sessions into analytics records and Hub-ready payloads.

session.exportToHub.description: Format and export completed/aborted session analytics to the Family Fund Hub when enabled.

import.recipe.description: Parse and normalize recipe imports before session composition.

import.cleaningPlan.description: Parse and normalize cleaning plans before session composition.

import.gardenPlan.description: Parse and normalize garden/seed data into runnable tasks.

import.animalTask.description: Parse and normalize animal care/butchery tasks.

nutrition.scrapeAndNormalize.description: Scrape and normalize nutrition for session-linked recipes and meal plans.

automation.scheduler.tick.description: Periodic automation tick to suggest or schedule sessions based on events.

automation.backgroundGuardRefresh.description: Lightweight background guard re-evaluation (weather, Sabbath, Quiet Hours) used by SessionRunner and Now CTAs.
